headline: Dominion Failed to Capitalize on the AI Boom. NextEra Can Fix That.
summary: NextEra is buying into a data center leader at just the right time—and an attractive price given Dominion’s struggles in the past few years.

headline: Entergy Arkansas Connects Classroom Learning to Real-World Careers
